authHeaderName: x-rapidapi-key: <YOUR_KEY>  (direct platform — do NOT send x-rapidapi-host)
rateLimitNotes: Free tier: 100 requests/day. Response header x-ratelimit-requests-remaining reports the remaining daily quota; a 429 body reads 'You have breached your daily request limits.' (resets daily). The key is server-side only (env HIGHLIGHTLY_KEY), proxied via /api — never sent to the browser, logs, or disk. Production caches via Vercel's CDN (s-maxage); local dev has no CDN, so vite.config.ts disk-caches /api responses to node_modules/.cache honouring the same s-maxage. Live in-play polling is window-gated to the knockout stage only.

endpoints.purpose: World Cup matches — schedule + results (the low-frequency results feed)
endpoints.exampleQuery: /matches?leagueId=1635&season=2026&limit=100&offset=0  (optionally &date=YYYY-MM-DD for a single match day's short-cached live poll)
endpoints.responseNotes: data[] of matches + pagination.totalCount. Each match: id, round (e.g. 'Round of 16'), date (ISO), state{description (FT/AET/Penalties/…), clock, score{current '1 - 0', penalties}}, homeTeam{name}, awayTeam{name}. Only FINISHED matches are surfaced to the app; in-play scores are never shown.

endpoints.purpose: Single match detail — event timeline (fantasy scoring + goal timeline)
endpoints.responseNotes: events[] each: time (e.g. '45+1'; a shootout kick is timed '120+N'), team{name}, type (Goal / Own Goal / Penalty / Missed Penalty / Yellow Card / Red Card / Substitution / …), player, playerNumber, assist.

endpoints.purpose: Single match statistics — per-team box score (ability-card radar + match report)
endpoints.responseNotes: per-team blocks; statistics[] of {displayName,value}: Possession (a fraction, ×100 for %), 'Shots within penalty area' + 'Shots outside penalty area' (sum = total shots), 'Shots on target', 'Expected Goals', 'Expected Assists', 'Key Passes', 'Fouls', 'Yellow cards', 'Red cards', 'Goalkeeper saves'.

notes: Supersedes the earlier API-Football research — the app switched to Highlightly. This API is used at RUNTIME only, for the dynamic knockout stage. The SEED (group-stage results, standings, schedule) is NOT from this API: it is compiled from public web sources (see fixtures.json / groups.json `sources`). The ability card's Attack/Defense come from those static seed scores with zero API; the richer axes fill in from knockout box scores.
